23.reason: [If p->left is NULL, calling search with NULL will cause a segmentation fault when accessing p->left or p->right in the next recursive call. Similarly for p->right. The condition should check each child before recursing.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [If p->left is NULL, calling search with NULL will cause a segmentation fault when accessing p->left or p->right in the next recursive call. Similarly for p->right. The condition should check each child before recursing.]

24.reason: [Same issue: if p->right is NULL, this leads to undefined behavior in the next call.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Same issue: if p->right is NULL, this leads to undefined behavior in the next call.]

38.reason: [If the input n is 0, root will be NULL, and passing NULL to search will cause a crash when accessing p->left or p->right. The program should handle empty tree case.]
